SUMMARY

A brief description of the feature you would like.

USE CASE

Explain the problem this would solve or the workflow it would improve.

PROPOSED SOLUTION

If you have an idea for how this could work, describe it here.

ALTERNATIVES CONSIDERED

Any other approaches you thought about.
